arts.ttl: Everton vs Newcastle: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Everton appear to have found their feet after a shaky start to the season, with Newcastle United their next test in the Premier League this Saturday. Score draws with Leicester City and Southampton came prior - Everton losing the latter on penalties in the Carabao Cup - but the weekend's clash with Newcastle promises to be a sterner test for Sean Dyche's side.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's 'appetite' response as future Newcastle United stadium capacity debated
arts.sum: Eddie Howe believes there is plenty of appetite for Newcastle United to push on with plans for a bigger stadium attendance - whether that is at St James' Park or a brand new venue. Magpies CEO Darren Eales recently raised hopes of an imminent answer over the club's future stadium plans but Newcastle's Chief Operating Officer Brad Miller now insists a decision either way won't be taken until at least early 2025 .

arts.ttl: Newcastle rivals' 'very lucrative' fear and the move needed to reveal Man City legal result
arts.sum: Premier League clubs did not want Newcastle United to be in a position 'to do a Manchester City' by signing 'very lucrative' sponsorship deals. "An associated party is a new phrase which the Premier League appears to have pulled out of its hat like a magician and these are a set of rules that were introduced not so coincidentally with the takeover of Newcastle United by Saudi Arabia," Maguire told the Price of Football.

arts.ttl: Inside Newcastle United's £400m mission to bring back Champions League football
arts.sum: Looking back on that win over PSG, Howe said: "I think we'll forever remember that game – or I and I'm sure a lot of people will remember that game – as the benchmark of what we want nights at St James' Park to look like. We've now reached the anniversary of Newcastle's 4-1 win over Paris St-Germain in the Champions League - a moment which felt like the Magpies had arrived on the big stage.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Everton with big names back but one more missing
arts.sum: Newcastle United will be desperate to maintain the momentum picked up in last weekend's stirring Premier League peformance against Manchester City when they face Everton at Goodison Park tonight. It leaves Howe with a strong squad for Everton, with Sandro Tonali, Anthony Gordon, Bruino Guimaraes, Dan Burn, Kieran Tripper all set to return to the starting line-up after bench roles or complete midweek rest.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche reveals big message he sends to key Everton man who is own harshest critic
arts.sum: Everton manager Sean Dyche believes Dwight McNeil's success has coincided with the 24-year-old becoming more aware that his value goes beyond goals and assists

arts.ttl: If Everton are close to better future then one man will deserve unique recognition they never seek
arts.sum: Everton FC correspondent Joe Thomas on the impact and influence still held by Seamus Coleman after his intervention sparked another important win last weekend

arts.ttl: Everton vs Newcastle United TV channel, live stream, kick off time
arts.sum: Newcastle United make what could be their final visit to Goodison Park tonight as they look to sign off for the October international break with an important away win. Everton have been buoyed by last weekend's win over Crystal Palace, but Eddie Howe's Magpies put in perhaps their best performance of the season to earn a 1-1 draw with champions Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche hails 'self-critical' Everton star now shining in a new role
arts.sum: Dwight McNeil has shone for the Toffees in the early part of the season, being handed a new role in midfield by boss Sean Dyche and scoring twice in the win over Crystal Palace last weekend

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle United to Become Adidas Elite Team
arts.sum: Update: Footy Headlines can confirm that the next team to become an Adidas 'elite team' will be Newcastle United.
